summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Project Atlas banking platform iteration 3 with visual design enhancements, support tickets, and notifications features. Backend: 100% success (20/20 tests). Frontend: Core functionality working with minor CSS class and navigation issues.

ui_bugs.issue: Navigation tabs only show 'Accounts' and 'Security' - missing KYC and Support tabs in the main navigation
ui_bugs.note: Users can still access /kyc and /support via direct URL, but tabs are not visible in navigation

design_issues.issue: CSS classes .balance-card, .corner-accent, and .blue-corner not found in DOM, though visual design still shows light blue gradient background
design_issues.note: Visual design looks correct with light blue accents, but specific CSS classes from index.css may not be applied to all elements

passed_tests: Backend: Admin get user details API
Backend: Admin charge fee ledger operation
Backend: Admin get all tickets API
Backend: Mark notification as read API
Frontend: Login page hero gradient background
Frontend: Login page enhanced card styling
Frontend: Notification bell icon in header
Frontend: Support ticket creation and display
Frontend: Light blue gradient backgrounds visible
Frontend: Blue button styling with glow effect

priority_items.item: Add KYC and Support navigation tabs to CustomerDashboard
priority_items.details: The navigation bar in CustomerDashboard (App.js lines 403-420) only shows Accounts and Security tabs. Add KYC and Support tabs to match the routing structure.

optional_items.item: Verify CSS class application on dashboard cards
optional_items.details: Ensure .balance-card, .corner-accent, and .blue-corner classes from index.css are properly applied to account cards in CustomerDashboard

detailed_notes.visual_design: Light blue accents, gradients, and enhanced styling are visible throughout the application. Hero gradient on login page, header gradients, and blue button glow effects are all working correctly.
detailed_notes.new_features: Support ticket system is fully functional - users can create tickets, view ticket lists, and see ticket details. Notifications API is working and notification bell icon is present in header with dropdown functionality.
detailed_notes.backend_performance: All 20 backend API tests passed with 100% success rate. New endpoints for support tickets and notifications are working correctly.
detailed_notes.admin_features: Admin dashboard loads correctly with User Management, KYC Review, and Audit Logs tabs. Admin can view user details and access ledger tools.
detailed_notes.testing_limitations: Some frontend tests were limited by Playwright selector syntax issues when using page.evaluate(). However, manual verification via screenshots and successful API tests confirm functionality.
